strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Founder of open-source GIS platform demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Lacks 15 years of senior-level experience expected for a Director-level IC role
No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
No evidence of cloud platform strategy work or advising strategic customers at scale

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and shipped AI products
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure

response.justification: The role requires a Director-level IC with 15 years of engineering experience, recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products, and cloud platform strategy fluency. The candidate has roughly 13-16 years of hands-on development experience but at Senior/Staff levels, with no evidence of principal-scope influence, advising strategic customers, or shaping product direction across organizations. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP and agent tooling work at re:cinq — no shipped AI platforms, research background, or advanced degree in an AI field. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage at Optilyz rather than cloud platform strategy. Strong craftsmanship and breadth, but the seniority and AI-strategy bar is not met.
